property.source: OnTheMarket current asking-price snapshot + HM Land Registry PPD fallback
property.referencePeriod: Current 2026 OnTheMarket asking-price snapshot on 2026-04-02 for semi-detached homes with 3+ bedrooms and 2+ bathrooms; fallback uses HM Land Registry 12-month stratified transaction window 2025-04-02 to 2026-04-02 with a local 800m catchment first, a 1600m extended-area fallback, and then a lower-confidence outer transaction ring up to 5000m when the nearer sample is too sparse (with prior-year comparison window for trend proxy)

transport.source: TfL Journey Planner + TfL StopPoint arrivals + OSRM (with station-profile fallback)
transport.referencePeriod: Snapshot queries to the TfL Journey Planner central-London core, TfL StopPoint arrivals, and OSRM routing using query windows on 2026-03-25 and 2026-03-26.

schools.source: DfE GIAS open state-funded establishment exports + DfE Explore Education Statistics KS2 and absence data + Ofsted state-funded schools inspections and outcomes
schools.referencePeriod: Counts refreshed from GIAS open state-funded export dated 2026-04-02; primary attainment basket from 2023-onward KS2 202324-202425; attendance supplement from 2023-onward primary absence 202324; Ofsted overlay as at 2025-08-31

pollution.source: DEFRA UK-AIR modelled background pollution data (PCM)
pollution.referencePeriod: DEFRA PCM 2024 annual mean NO2 and PM2.5 1km grids

greenSpace.source: Ordnance Survey OS Open Greenspace GeoPackage
greenSpace.referencePeriod: Current OS Open Greenspace GB GeoPackage snapshot

crime.source: data.police.uk monthly street-level crime archive (BTP, City of London, Metropolitan, and London-boundary forces) + ONS 2024 LSOA-derived station catchment population denominator
crime.referencePeriod: All currently available data.police.uk archive months from 2023-02 to 2026-01 (36 monthly snapshots) averaged and annualised

planning.referencePeriod: Current planning.data.gov.uk geometry pull for brownfield land, conservation areas, and article 4 direction areas

population.source: ONS mid-year LSOA population estimates + ONS 2021 LSOA boundaries
population.referencePeriod: ONS mid-2024 LSOA population estimates apportioned into station 800m and 1800m buffers
